title: Eidolons Eval Scorecard (matrix arm result)
description: Written by `eidolons eval swe --matrix <arms.json>` to evals/results/<UTC-date>-<suite>-<label>.scorecard.json, one file per arm (--no-store opts out). A committed, diffable record consumed by `eidolons eval baseline`. Smoke scorecards (harness.smoke:true) are plumbing-validation only — they prove the orchestration, not model capability. See evals/results/README.md.

suite.description: Suite identifier (the suite file's basename without .yaml), e.g. "swe-suite" or "kupo-keep-suite".

resolved.description: true iff at least one of the k runs reached final=passed.

passes.description: Number of the k runs that reached final=passed.

attempts.description: k — the number of independent runs attempted for this task.

pass_k_rate.description: Fraction of tasks resolved in ALL k runs (pass^k).

smoke.description: true iff this arm ran under --smoke (gold_fix reference, no model) — a plumbing-validation run, never a capability claim.
